title: ETF Button Reimagined
description: Reimagined the button texture of the resourcepack menu (Entity Texture Features Mod).
body:
## 概述 / Overview
- **重绘了模组ETF (实体纹理特性) 在Minecraft原版资源包界面的按钮，使其更加容易辨认且更美观。**
- **The buttons of mod ETF (Entity Texture Features) in the interface of Minecraft original resourcepack have been redrawn to make it easier to recognize and more beautiful.**
## 其他 / Others
- **其他下载链接 / Other download interlinkage：https://xyebbs.com/res-id/etfbtorem**
- **所需前置资源 / Pre-required resources：[ETF (Entity Texture Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).**
